options.description: This method returns entitlement group details. The amount of data returned can be adjusted by using query expand parameter configuration.

options.name: Get Entitlement
options.description: This method returns entitlement details

options.name: Get Entitlement Group Authorized Contacts
options.description: This method returns list of contacts (with ABL credentials) authorized for the entitlement group

options.description: This method returns entitlement group list. Amount of data returned can be adjusted by using query expand parameter configuration.

options.description: This method returns list of entitlement notes

options.name: List of Entitlement Activations
options.description: This method returns list of entitlement activation that can be filtered by following query parameters

options.name: Log of Activations Activity
options.description: This method returns log of activations activity on the entitlement

options.name: Get Global Feature
options.description: This method returns selected global feature

options.name: Get Global Features List
options.description: This method returns list of all global features

options.name: Get Offering
options.description: This method returns offering details

options.name: Get Offering List
options.description: This method returns list of offering that can be filtered by the following query parameters

options.name: Get Plan
options.description: This method returns plan details

options.name: Get Plan List
options.description: This method returns list of plans that can be filtered by following query parameters

options.name: Get a Product List
options.description: This method returns a list of products that can be filtered by following query parameters

options.name: Get Edition
options.description: This method returns product edition details

options.name: Get Edition Attribute
options.description: This method returns selected attribute with value defined in edition level (in case of override). If no value is defined in edition level, value defined in higher level is returned.

options.name: Get Edition Attributes List
options.description: This method returns list of all attributes for selected edition

options.name: Get Edition Feature
options.description: This method returns selected feature with value defined in edition level (in case of override). If no value is defined in edition level, value defined in higher level is returned.

options.name: Get Edition Feature List
options.description: This method returns list of all features for selected edition

options.name: Get Edition List
options.description: This method returns list of editions that can be filtered by following query parameters

options.name: Get Product
options.description: This method returns product details

options.name: Get Product Attribute
options.description: This method returns selected attribute. In case of global attribute, if overridden value exists on product level, it will be returned, otherwise global value will be returned.

options.name: Get Product Attributes List
options.description: This method returns list of all attributes for selected product

options.name: Get Product Feature
options.description: This method returns selected feature. In case of global feature, if overridden value exists on product level, it will be returned, otherwise global value will be returned.

options.name: Get Product Features List
options.description: This method returns list of all features for selected product

options.description: Get a set of relevant keyword data with Google Ads metrics, product categories, and Google SERP data

options.name: Get SERP Competitors
options.description: Get a list of domains ranking for the keywords you specify

options.name: Get Ranked Keywords
options.description: Get the list of keywords that any domain or webpage is ranking for

options.name: Get Competitors Domain
options.description: Get a full overview of ranking and traffic data of the competitor domains from organic and paid search

options.name: Get Domain Intersection
options.description: Get keywords for which both specified domains rank within the same SERP

options.name: Get Subdomains
options.description: Get the list of subdomains of the specified domain, along with the ranking distribution across organic and paid search

options.name: Get Relevant Pages
options.description: Get rankings and traffic data for the web pages of the specified domain

options.name: Get Domain Rank Overview
options.description: Get ranking and traffic data from organic search for a domain

options.name: Get Historical SERPs
options.description: Get Google SERPs collected within the specified time frame

options.name: Get Historical Rank Overview
options.description: Get historical data on rankings and traffic of the specified domain, such as domain ranking distribution in SERPs and estimated monthly traffic volume for both organic and paid results

options.name: Get Page Intersection
options.description: Get the keywords for which specified pages rank within the same SERP

options.name: Get Bulk Traffic Estimation
options.description: Get estimated monthly traffic volumes for up to 1,000 domains, subdomains, or webpages

options.name: Get Historical Bulk Traffic Estimation
options.description: Get historical monthly traffic volumes for up to 1,000 domains collected within the specified time range through October 2020

options.name: Get Bulk Search Volume
options.description: Get search volume values for a maximum of 1,000 keywords in one API request

options.name: Get Related Keywords
options.description: Get keywords appearing in the "Related Searches" section on Amazon

options.name: Get Ranked Keywords
options.description: Get the list of keywords the target product ranks for on Amazon

options.name: Get Product Rank Overview
options.description: Get ranking data from organic and paid Amazon SERPs for the target products

options.name: Get Product Competitors
options.description: Get a list of products that intersect with a target asin in Amazon SERPs

options.name: Get Product Keyword Intersections
options.description: Get a list of keywords for which the target products intersect in Amazon SERP

options.name: Get Bulk Keyword Difficulty
options.description: Get the Keyword Difficulty metric for a maximum of 1,000 keywords

options.name: Get Bulk Traffic Estimation
options.description: Get estimated monthly traffic volumes for up to 1,000 domains, subdomains, and pages

options.name: Get Competitors Domain
options.description: Get a full overview of ranking and traffic data of the competitor domains from organic and paid search

options.name: Get Domain Rank Overview

options.name: Get Related Keywords
